intro: This archive contains 16 articles from April 12 to April 21, 2026, detailing a series of high-severity incidents. The activity primarily targeted the government, cryptocurrency, telecommunications, corporate, and education sectors, with notable impact in the United states, North america, Canada, Europe, and Florida. The threat landscape was dominated by distinct actors: Scattered Spider, BlackCat (ALPHV), and W3LL. The reporting mix consists of 12 high, 3 medium, and 1 informational severity articles, reflecting a concentrated period of significant cyber activity across these regions and industries.
